description_long: This rifle features a long, straight barrel with a dark finish, complemented by a robust, angular stock in a muted brown color. The receiver and action area are compact, with a visible trigger guard and a simple, squared-off magazine well. The stock is solid and blocky, providing a stable shoulder rest, while the fore-end is slim and extends nearly to the muzzle. The rifle lacks any advanced attachments, presenting only basic iron sights and a plain muzzle. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function over form.
description: A long, dark-barreled rifle with a solid brown stock and basic iron sights, featuring a utilitarian, blocky design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the brown stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and barrel details, with the trigger and magazine area visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the squared-off stock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
